use_cases: Creative landing page hero sections that need eye-catching animated typography
Interactive portfolio showcases requiring distinctive text visualization
Brand landing pages seeking memorable animated wordmark effects
Demo or showcase pages for creative developer tools or design platforms
ai_summary: An interactive particle typography component that renders text by animating thousands of particles which attract toward letter shapes and disperse with mouse movement. Features configurable physics parameters including particle count, friction, attraction force, and noise strength. Creates a mesmerizing thermal-gradient color palette effect where particles continuously flow to form text typography and respond to cursor proximity with dispersion physics.
